prompt: Simulate an outbound call where Karen Williams is angry, demands to know how they got her number, accuses harassment, then says 'take me off your list.'

assertions.text: Agent remains calm and professional throughout, never matches the angry tone
Agent answers 'how did you get my number' with the honest response about reaching out to local residents
Agent addresses 'trying to sell me something' concern with 'Not at all — just checking if we can help with property needs'
Agent never argues, debates, or gets defensive with the prospect
When prospect says 'take me off your list', agent confirms removal immediately without resistance or delay
Agent does not guilt the prospect into staying or attempt further pitch after DNC request
Call ends immediately after DNC confirmation — no further conversation
Tool execution follows correct order: log_call_outcome → end_call after DNC
